title: Complete Guide: Downloading Your Premium Paid Certificate from ICICI Pru Life

description:
Are you looking to manage your ICICI Prudential Life Insurance premium payments with ease? This video guide is here to help! Learn how to effortlessly download your Premium Certificate, an essential document for your records. Whether you need it for tax purposes or personal documentation, we have got you covered.

Simply visit our ICICI Prudential website and navigate to the "Download Statements" section. Scroll down to the “Premium Paid Certificate" tab located on the Old Services page. From there, enter your policy number and date of birth. After submitting these details, an OTP will be sent to your registered mobile number and email ID for verification. Once verified, you can download the certificate directly to your device. Also, we make sure to send it to your registered email for easy access.

Additionally, you can log in to your ICICI Prudential online account to download other important statements. This will help you manage your policy details efficiently. Also, our streamlined process ensures that your premium payments are always up to date and your documents are securely stored.

Stay organised and ensure that your premium payments are well-managed with ICICI Prudential’s user-friendly online services. With just a few clicks, you can easily access and download your Certificate Premium, helping you maintain accurate financial records.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

What is covered in this video?
0.07 Guide to how to download your Premium Paid Certificate
0.17 Click on Download Statement
0.20 Scroll to premium paid certificate & click Download now
0.25 Fill the required details & clivk on proceed
0.30 enter the OTP & submit
0.37 Click on download & e-mail
